prompt: Ultra-realistic surreal conceptual portrait of a handsome bearded man facing the camera, isolated on a clean white background. Creative miniature people effect, photorealistic, studio lighting, high detail, surrealism, 8K, professional photography, shallow depth of field, masterpiece.
